name: Crew'800
description_short: Crew'800 offers personal and business credit repair, disputing inaccuracies on credit reports and providing credit consulting to improve scores.
description_long:
Crew'800 LLC is a credit consulting firm based in Las Vegas (702 area code) that positions itself as a boutique credit repair and financial coaching service. The company emphasizes personalized, small-scale operations where they claim to micromanage each customer's file rather than operate at high volume. Their stated philosophy centers on the premise that credit reports frequently contain errors that damage scores, and their core mission is to identify and dispute inaccurate information.

The company offers a range of services including personal credit repair with 3-bureau monitoring, business credit consulting and establishment, personalized credit blueprints created after reviewing all three credit reports, one-on-one credit coaching with weekly consultations, and financial education. They claim to have training in recent laws, statutes, and credit reporting practices, positioning this expertise as enabling faster credit score improvement by targeting high-impact negative items first. Their service model includes private assessments, creditor contact on the customer's behalf, documentation submission to bureaus, and ongoing coaching.

Crew'800 differentiates itself primarily through claims of hands-on service quality and speed. Marketing language emphasizes treating each customer's credit "as if it was our own" and promises to save customers time, money, and frustration. They position themselves as an "inexpensive" alternative to larger firms and stress convenience and dedication to customer success. The business credit component—helping establish vendor accounts and tradelines after meeting banking criteria—represents a secondary service line beyond individual credit repair.

The company's website shows basic design (GoDaddy builder) with repetitive content sections and limited depth regarding specific processes or guarantees. No pricing information, success rates, typical timelines, or regulatory disclosures are provided on the public website. The emphasis on personal relationships and small-scale operations suggests a local or regional focus rather than a national platform. As with all credit repair firms, results depend heavily on the legitimacy of disputed items and existing credit conditions.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers 3-bureau credit monitoring, addressing all major credit reporting agencies
Provides dual services for personal and business credit, not just individual repair
Includes one-on-one weekly coaching as part of service, enabling ongoing customer support
Claims specific training in recent credit laws, statutes, and reporting practices
Explicitly identifies and targets high-impact negative items to accelerate score improvement
Provides personalized credit blueprints after reviewing all three credit reports
Small-scale business model allowing claimed micromanagement of individual files
cons: Website provides no pricing information, making cost comparison impossible
No stated guarantees, timeline expectations, or typical results metrics published
No customer testimonials, case studies, or documented success rates available
Lacks transparency regarding specific dispute processes, creditor contact methods, or regulatory compliance
Minimal digital footprint and no verifiable third-party ratings or certifications mentioned
best_for: Small business owners seeking to establish or repair business credit profiles
Individuals with specific, identifiable errors on credit reports wanting hands-on dispute assistance
Customers in the Las Vegas area preferring local, personalized credit consulting
People willing to pay for weekly coaching alongside credit repair services
diagnosis: Crew'800 is best suited for individuals with documented credit report errors or negative items who prefer personalized, local service and can afford ongoing coaching fees. The primary caveat is the lack of published pricing, verifiable results, or regulatory documentation—making it impossible to assess value, legitimacy, or likely outcome before engaging their services.
services: Personal credit repair with dispute filing against credit bureaus
Personalized credit blueprint creation after full 3-bureau report review
Vendor account and tradeline building for businesses
One-on-one credit coaching with weekly consultations
Creditor contact and negotiation on customer behalf
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1810 E Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89104
meta_description: Crew'800 offers personal and business credit repair, disputing inaccuracies on credit reports and providing credit consulting to improve scores.
